_doc.description: SD1.5 txt2img (ComfyUI API-format prompt graph) with TWO stacked IP-Adapter branches: a STYLE branch and a SUBJECT branch. POST this dict to /prompt. gen.py deep-copies it and overwrites values BY NODE ID (never by array index). Model flows: checkpoint '4' -> style IPAdapterAdvanced '11' -> subject IPAdapterAdvanced '21' -> KSampler '3'.

injection_points.style_image_filename: node '12' -> inputs.image (LoadImage; filename already present in ComfyUI/input via comfyui.upload_image). Only the first style ref is wired; multi-style averaging is a follow-up.
injection_points.style_weight: node '11' -> inputs.weight (IPAdapterAdvanced, STYLE branch). style-leaning weight_type='style transfer'.
injection_points.subject_image_filename: node '22' -> inputs.image (LoadImage; the single subject ref, uploaded via comfyui.upload_image)
injection_points.subject_weight: node '21' -> inputs.weight (IPAdapterAdvanced, SUBJECT branch). composition/face-leaning weight_type='composition'.

branch_bypass.both_present: KSampler '3' inputs.model = ['21', 0]. Style loader '10' reads model from checkpoint ['4', 0]; subject loader '20' reads model from style adapter ['11', 0].
branch_bypass.no_subject: Drop nodes '20','21','22'. Point KSampler '3' inputs.model = ['11', 0] (style adapter output). Style branch unchanged (loader '10' from checkpoint ['4',0]).
branch_bypass.no_style: Drop nodes '10','11','12'. Repoint subject loader '20' inputs.model = ['4', 0] (raw checkpoint) so the subject adapter stacks on the checkpoint directly. KSampler '3' inputs.model = ['21', 0].
branch_bypass.neither: Drop nodes '10','11','12','20','21','22'. Point KSampler '3' inputs.model = ['4', 0]. Equivalent to plain txt2img (fall back to the single-ref workflow instead in practice).

_doc.requires_custom_nodes: IPAdapterUnifiedLoader / IPAdapterAdvanced require 'ComfyUI_IPAdapter_plus' (cubiq). weight_type values used ('style transfer','composition') require a recent version; if unsupported, change them to 'linear' in this file.
_doc.notes: Node IDs are strings (ComfyUI API format). Links are [<node_id>, <output_index>] pairs. STYLE branch = 10/11/12, SUBJECT branch = 20/21/22.
